recentTweets.text:
1.5 million kids lost access to food assistance as a result of the Big Ugly Bill's historic SNAP cuts.

I put forward an amendment to reverse the cuts and give our kids the food assistance they need.

Republicans shot it down. https://t.co/gbxVogxwcT

🚨This air quality is extremely dangerous. If you can, please avoid spending time outside. 

Make sure to drink plenty of water and check on your neighbors.

https://t.co/ks43v3UrwR
RT @DropSiteNews: 🇺🇸 NEWS: Rep. Ilhan Omar introduced a resolution urging the United States to join the International Criminal Court, The G…

RT @GovTimWalz: Minnesota: Stay up-to-date with the air quality in your area and take steps to keep you and your family safe.

Learn more h…

RT @commondreams: Ilhan Omar Takes Marco Rubio to Task With Call for US to Finally Join International Criminal Court

"America is strongest…

The ICC is a crucial tool for justice when victims have nowhere else to turn. 

If we believe in human rights and the rule of law, we should strengthen international justice—not work to dismantle it.

Proud to introduce this resolution.

The House will vote on an amendment to cut off aid to Israel. 

It is unconscionable we continue to fund this genocidal apartheid regime. 

Voting YES.

America is strongest when we lead with our values, not when we demand immunity from them. If we respect human rights, uphold the rule of law, and hold ourselves to the same standards we ask of others, we have nothing to fear from the ICC.

The United States should lead by example, not exempt itself from the standards it expects everyone else to follow. In 2022, I introduced a resolution calling on the United States to join the ICC because I believe America should stand with victims of atrocities, defend human
Secretary Rubio claims that the ICC poses ‘an intolerable threat to U.S. sovereignty’ and that American servicemembers could be prosecuted simply for serving our country. That is simply not true.

The ICC is an international court of last resort, intended to prosecute only the most horrific crimes – war crimes, genocide, and crimes against humanity – when countries are unable or unwilling to do so themselves. The best way to avoid ICC scrutiny is simple: don't commit

Secretary Rubio’s announcement that he will dismantle the International Criminal Court is reckless and dangerous. It undermines the rule of law, weakens global accountability, and turns America's back on the values we claim to champion.
The ICC is an independent international court created to ensure that perpetrators of the world's gravest crimes—genocide, war crimes, and crimes against humanity—cannot escape justice.
RT @HennepinAtty: Hennepin County Attorney’s Office announces two-way evidence sharing between state and federal agencies for Metro Surge s…

Trump’s tantrum couldn’t stop us — our bipartisan housing bill is now law!

This landmark legislation will make it easier to build more affordable housing and stop Wall Street from buying up homes.

Proud to get this done.

Proud our office was able to secure $3 million in federal funding for Avenues for Youth's new housing facility!

This new building will provide shelter to youth experiencing homelessness and give them a safe place to call home. #DeliveringForTheFifth https://t.co/YvOHMhpI9M

If we can afford to give the Pentagon another $1.5 TRILLION, we can afford to make sure kids don’t go hungry or die from lack of health coverage.

Truly shameful that we always find money for war and not for children.
I met with @GovTimWalz to get state updates and discuss ways we’re building a stronger Minnesota. 💪🏽 https://t.co/DIvR1xdr99

Proud to join @RepRashida, @repdeliaramirez, and 186 members of Congress in voting to end U.S. complacency in Israel's atrocities in Lebanon.

We cannot stand by while innocent civilians are being slaughtered with our tax dollars. We must act now.
RT @DropSiteNews: ⚖️ Rep. Ilhan Omar has introduced nine amendments to the FY2027 National Defense Authorization Act (NDAA), focused on hum…
RT @DropSiteNews: Reps. Omar, AOC, Ro Khanna, and Greg Casar have all now publicly announced their support for the Massie amendment to the…

I introduced 9 amendments to the NDAA. 

The amendments aim to center human rights in the military and foreign policy; strengthen oversight over the DoD’s use of AI; support Sudanese civil society; and hold governments engaged in transnational repression accountable. https://t.co/ELuStNc2JD

The House will vote on an amendment that would block funding to Israel.

It should be a no brainer: Our tax dollars should not fund a genocide.

We cannot continue to be complicit in Israel’s crimes against humanity.

Americans are struggling to put a roof over their heads.

Trump has the solution in his hands, but he refuses to act because he wants his voter suppression bill passed.

Shameful.

SCOTUS delivered 3 wins today:

✅ States may count late-arriving mail-in ballots postmarked on or before Election Day
✅ Federal Board Reserve Member Lisa Cook, who Trump illegally fired, may continue to serve
✅ Trump's attempt to appeal his sexual abuse verdict was rejected

Trump has thrown our country into complete chaos:

ICE is terrorizing Black and Brown families.
Trump is peddling an unwanted, deadly war in Iran.
And working people are suffering under skyrocketing costs, while billionaires rake in record profits.

None of this is normal. My

RT @GovTimWalz: Keep an eye on the heat this week and stay safe, Minnesota.

https://t.co/UBlGSRDMm5
If only we could have nice things… https://t.co/D5nlALip1m

We are sick and tired of our healthcare system putting profits before people.

We need to create a future where every single person can get the care they need regardless of their ability to pay. 

We need Medicare for All. My op-ed with @Public_Citizen:
https://t.co/fjvy2iO568
RT @truthout: .@IlhanMN: Trump has gutted Medicaid. The loss of funding will strip coverage from millions of people and make an already bro…

Proud to pass TWO bipartisan bills through @EdWorkforceDems to help ensure injured workers are accurately compensated from the start.

This is exactly what good governance should look like. Next step: a vote on the House Floor! https://t.co/3BTsVN56Ne

Congress just passed the biggest housing bill in 30 years to build more housing and crack down on corporate landlords.

But Trump is refusing to sign it into law because he is mad at the Senate. 

Typical Trump. Always out for himself at the expense of working people.

Trump’s Big Ugly Bill has stripped food benefits from nearly 800,000 children.

In the richest country on Earth, we are taking food away from kids to hand billionaires a tax cut. 

Unconscionable.

Sudan continues to face a horrific humanitarian crisis and a genocide.

The reports of the RSF's siege on al-Obeid are beyond alarming.

The international community must stop supporting the genocidal RSF and RSF-aligned militias. The cycle of violence must end.
RT @GovTimWalz: I will never stop exercising my constitutional rights to stand up for Minnesotans and the American freedoms we hold dear.…

On Juneteenth, we celebrate Black freedom and resilience while acknowledging the lasting impact of slavery. 

We must build a future where every Black American can thrive, free from discrimination.

Our fight for racial justice continues. ✊🏽

Good news: the House just passed a bill to make it easier for workers to collectively bargain!

The Faster Labor Contracts Act bans corporations from stalling union contracts.

Let's go!

Republicans claim that parents are losing their right to decide what their kids learn in school. 

That is categorically FALSE. 

Republicans are weaponizing misinformation to advance their right-wing culture war at the expense of our kids’ education. https://t.co/21tkhrP33k

In Minnesota, we are resilient. We are courageous. And we will not be intimidated by a fraudster president who reaches for the same old playbook of lies, racism, and deflection every time his administration fails to deliver for the American people. https://t.co/KcXK8g18cm

Trump's State Department says the Central African Republic is too dangerous to visit. So why are we deporting people there when they have no ties?

Once again, this policy is illegal, inhumane, and unacceptable.

Republicans want to send ICE another $70 billion. With that money, we could:

- Pay for two years of free childcare for over 1 million kids
- Extend the ACA premium tax credits by at least a year
- Cancel 1/3 of Americans' medical debt

Abolish ICE. Invest in working Americans. https://t.co/iBPn1nwFKC
RT @CityMinneapolis: The Minneapolis Police Department is supporting the Hennepin County Sheriff’s Office in response to an ongoing law enf…

Surprise, surprise: Trump's top labor prosecutor sided with Amazon, her former client, and hurt delivery drivers in their fight for fair working conditions.

It’s her responsibility to hold law-breaking companies accountable — not to give Trump's billionaire buddies bailouts. https://t.co/jym7yAx9Ts

I have always, and will continue, to stand with the Ukrainian people and unequivocally condemn Putin’s illegal and brutal invasion. I voted against the Ukraine Support Act because of its inclusion of broad economic sanctions. Time and again, sanctions like these fail to achieve
RT @business: In a hearing Thursday, Ilhan Omar pressed Trump's top labor prosecutor on what she called a bailout for Amazon, one of the NL…

This is horrifying. A private prison corporation is profiting off the forced labor of ICE detainees at Delaney Hall.

People are being denied access to basic medical care & sanitation. They're given rotten food to eat.

It's not enough to shut these facilities down. Abolish ICE.

Israel's war in Lebanon has killed thousands of civilians and displaced over a million — and the United States is bankrolling this terror. It's unconscionable.

We must pass @RepRashida's War Powers Resolution and stop the United States' complicity in Israel's war crimes. https://t.co/gtBladO7uZ

The House is voting on a War Powers Resolution to stop Trump's war in Iran.

Americans have made it clear that they want no part in this reckless war.

Last month, Republicans pulled down the vote because they knew we had the support to pass it. 

Tonight, let's get it done.

Happy Pride Month, Minnesota! ❤️

We won’t stop fighting until every single LGBTQ+ American can live authentically, free from the fear of discrimination. 

The fight for equality continues! 🏳️‍🌈

Thank you to everyone who came out to our May Town Hall in South Minneapolis!

Always grateful to connect monthly with Minnesotans. ❤️ https://t.co/oDaaNcpw4q

The people of Ethiopia deserve the right to choose their own future.

After years of violence and suffering, they deserve peace, justice, and respect for their sovereign voice.

The Ethiopian government must guarantee free and fair elections that reflect the will of the people.

I was proud to secure $1 million in federal funding for the development of NEON Collective Kitchens in North Minneapolis!

This commercial kitchen space will create new opportunities for entrepreneurs in the Twin Cities and bring over 250 new jobs to our community. https://t.co/v9BYHEJIku

Last week, House Republicans pulled down the vote needed to stop Trump's war with Iran because they knew it was going to pass and upset Trump.

Congress has failed to assert its authority for 12 straight weeks.

End the war now.

Eid Mubarak to everyone celebrating in Minnesota and around the world! 

May this Eid bring you renewed hope, peace, and love. 💙

On Memorial Day, we honor the brave service members who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country. 

We’re forever grateful for their service and sacrifice.

I introduced a bill with @SenatorShaheen  and @RepChrisPappas  to put a stop to manufactured home evictions and hold bad landlords accountable. 

Let’s get this done.
https://t.co/a1t85SIZpR

The Bukele regime is trampling international law and basic human rights with impunity.

The United States must stop enabling Bukele’s regime immediately. All political prisoners must be freed and an independent investigation into these abuses must take place.

Free Ruth Lopez.

RT @TheBlackCaucus: The issue was never simply a bill.

Black political representation is not a side issue.

The issue is whether instituti…

This commercial kitchen space will create new opportunities for entrepreneurs in the Twin Cities and bring over 250 new jobs to our community. https://t.co/v9BYHEJIku

Last week, House Republicans pulled down the vote needed to stop Trump's war with Iran because they knew it was going to pass and upset Trump.

Congress has failed to assert its authority for 12 straight weeks.

End the war now.

Eid Mubarak to everyone celebrating in Minnesota and around the world! 

May this Eid bring you renewed hope, peace, and love. 💙

On Memorial Day, we honor the brave service members who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country. 

We’re forever grateful for their service and sacrifice.

I introduced a bill with @SenatorShaheen  and @RepChrisPappas  to put a stop to manufactured home evictions and hold bad landlords accountable. 

Let’s get this done.
https://t.co/a1t85SIZpR

Free Ruth Lopez.

RT @TheBlackCaucus: The issue was never simply a bill.

Black political representation is not a side issue.

The issue is whether instituti…

I'm relieved to see the Minnesota legislature reach a deal to save Hennepin County Medical Center.

HCMC is our state's safety net hospital. 

I'm glad to know its doors will remain open for thousands of Minnesotans who rely on it to get the critical care they need.

My heart is with the communities impacted by the devastating wildfires burning across Northern Minnesota.

I'm incredibly grateful to our National Guard, emergency responders, and local officials working tirelessly to contain the fires and keep Minnesotans safe.

I was proud to secure $1.6 million in federal funding to revitalize Sochacki Park!

This money will be used to improve Sochacki Park's water systems, allowing better access to cleaner water, and make the park more accessible to all Minnesotans. #DeliveringForTheFifth https://t.co/q0DJbZ0oHC

For a decade, Rep. Koegel has worked tirelessly to improve the lives of everyday Minnesotans.

It was an honor to serve with Rep. Koegel in the Minnesota State Legislature, and I look forward to seeing the positive impacts of her work for years to come! #MinnesotaMinute https://t.co/NcsOnElXtA

The Nakba never ended. The genocide of Palestinians continues as the Israeli military escalates violence in Gaza, the West Bank, and Lebanon.

I'm joining @RepRashida in co-sponsoring a resolution to recognize the 78th anniversary of the Nakba and Palestinian refugees’ rights.

When you create policies that make education unreachable for Americans who want it, you are failing at your job.

Linda McMahon is failing. https://t.co/V8HoEmka3d
RT @SenSanders: In the richest country in the history of the world, it is simply outrageous that 1 in 5 children will go hungry this year.…

No child should have to sit in a classroom hungry or worried about where their next meal will come from.

Excited to introduce the Universal School Meals Program Act with @SenSanders to feed kids with free breakfast, lunch, dinner, and snacks to students year-round.
It's about damn time Congress legalizes marijuana. https://t.co/lWBLBly28u
RT @RepLaMonica: In a moment that is testing me, I’m lucky to have these women standing with me in the fight for accountability from this a…

Thank you to all the high school students who came out and shared their bold ideas at our Youth Council Town Hall in Minneapolis!

I'll keep working in Congress to make their bright vision for our future a reality. 💪🏽 https://t.co/dl5afUQMfp

I sat down with leaders and advocates from Clare Housing and Sage to ensure we’re doing everything we can to push back against Trump’s cuts to HIV prevention, care, and treatment services.

We’ll keep fighting for a world where everyone can get the care and support they need. https://t.co/AC40yPftk8

Started my day off with some amazing students at Lucy Craft Laney Elementary School in North Minneapolis. We had an interactive reading of "Jayden's Impossible Garden."

Always incredible to meet with the Fifth District's brilliant students! https://t.co/8kwkUYGQqQ

Israel’s attack on the Global Sumud Flotilla is a clear violation of international law.

I'm joining @RepRashida in demanding an end to the blockade on Gaza and immediate humanitarian access.

Hennepin County Medical Center is a lifeline—I know, three of my kids were born there.

Republicans’ Medicaid cuts are pushing hospitals like HCMC to the brink.

This is about whether people get care in a crisis.

Minnesota cannot lose its safety net hospital. https://t.co/8GUsWByaex
Tuesday's feature: Lakes Makerie, a fabric shop and sewing studio in South Minneapolis! 🪡🧵 https://t.co/IdDBH8iADN

It's National Small Business Week! To celebrate, we are highlighting different small businesses from across the Fifth District.

Today's feature: Minuteman Press Uptown – a Black-owned, union print shop in Minneapolis! https://t.co/7ZYhznlyan

The Republican Farm Bill prioritizes corporate profits while abandoning families, children, and farmers.

It completely misses the mark in addressing the needs of working people. 

Voted NO.

I submitted 5 amendments to combat hunger at home and abroad, prioritize food workers’ safety, and invest in sustainable farming practices.

While none of these amendments were included, I will always put working families first over big corporations.
https://t.co/Qic127rTyB

Trump and Republicans gave ICE an $85 billion slush fund last year. ICE used that money to terrorize Black and Brown Minnesotans through "Operation Metro Surge."

Now Republicans want to send this rogue agency another $70 billion. 

ICE shouldn't get another cent. https://t.co/wcZbbNYqv4

The conflict in South Sudan has left the nation on the brink of a massive hunger crisis. For millions, aid can be the difference between life and death.

We have a moral obligation to take immediate action and provide critical humanitarian aid.

The House is voting today to extend FISA, a law that's been used to violate Americans' privacy and unfairly target minority communities.

This bill has no meaningful reforms to stop warrantless surveillance, directly undermining the 4th Amendment.

I’m voting NO.

We're back with another "Ilhan on the Hi-Job," a series where we feature small businesses across the Fifth District!

I'm all about investing in zero waste initiatives and @LumberStash 🪾is doing an incredible job. https://t.co/ThRbiRsIcA

The Supreme Court just eviscerated the Voting Rights Act. 

Trump and Republicans are rigging the rules to suppress the right to vote. 

If that’s the game, Democratic states must fight back to protect our democracy.

A rebrand won’t distract us from the truth: this reprehensible agency murdered two Minnesotans in broad daylight.

Abolish ICE.

We cannot build a just nation without directly confronting the inequities facing Black communities.

As we celebrate African Heritage Day, let us recommit to equity, to justice, and to building a Minnesota where Black communities don’t just survive, but truly thrive. https://t.co/76oYR8R47U

We hosted CD5's incredible artists at our 2026 Congressional Art Competition Reception! 

I'm proud to announce this year's winner, Will, whose piece, Bowl of Unity, will be displayed in the U.S. Capitol.

A special thank you to Patience Zalanga for delivering a keynote address! https://t.co/Qmqe0djQeQ

Dave Bicking was a beloved father, small business owner, and lifelong community activist who dedicated his life to advancing justice and advocating for meaningful policing reform in Minnesota.

I was honored to recognize his life and legacy on the House Floor. #MinnesotaMinute https://t.co/ZV2fcmAoCR

Heartbroken by the deadly shooting in Edina. My thoughts are with the victim’s family and loved ones.

I’m outraged that we continue to lose lives to gun violence. This has to end.

Republicans just opened the door to a massive mining project in the Boundary Waters—putting one of the most pristine ecosystems on the chopping block so corporations can profit.

On #EarthDay, let’s be clear: you don’t protect the planet by selling it off.

My sincere condolences go out to the family, friends, and staff of Congressman David Scott.

Rep. Scott was a beloved public servant and member of the Congressional Black Caucus, working tirelessly for Georgia's 13th Congressional District. He will be deeply missed.

Millions of Americans use marijuana, both medically and recreationally—yet, federal restrictions limit universities from conducting critical cannabis research.

I introduced a bill with @repdinatitus to remove these barriers and help us make better public health decisions.
